Paper_Metadata.Paper_Title: Achieving superior high-temperature mechanical properties in Al-Cu-Li-Sc-Zr alloy with nano-scale microstructure via laser additive manufacturing

Composition_Info.Note: Powder composition reported as Al-3.89Cu-1.22Li-0.98Sc-0.43Zr wt%; Al balance computed as 93.48 wt%

Process_Text.original: Gas-atomized alloy powder fabricated by LPBF using LiM-X260A LPBF machine; Laser power 300 W, scanning velocity 1200 mm/s, hatch spacing 0.1 mm, layer thickness 40 um; relative density exceeding 99.9%; as-fabricated condition with no post-processing
Process_Text.simplified: LPBF as-fabricated; 300 W, 1200 mm/s, 0.1 mm hatch, 40 um layer thickness

Microstructure_Text.original: Nearly random grain orientation distribution confirmed by IPF maps and weak pole figures with max texture intensity 2.79; fine equiaxed grains (avg 1.49 um) and coarse columnar grains (avg 1.84 um); Al2Cu and AlCuSc precipitates stacking along grain boundaries; Cu-rich and Sc-rich precipitates at grain boundaries; smaller Al2Cu and AlCuSc precipitates (42 nm) within coarse grains attributed to interdendritic segregation; Zr supersaturated in Al matrix; nanoscale structure present
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Random orientation FCC matrix; fine equiaxed (1.49 um) and columnar grains (1.84 um); Al2Cu and AlCuSc precipitates at grain boundaries (116-117 nm) and intragranular (42 nm); Zr supersaturated in matrix

Advanced_Quantitative_Features.EBSD: IPF maps showing nearly random grain orientation; weak texture with max intensity 2.79; fine equiaxed grains 1.49 um, coarse columnar grains 1.84 um
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.TKD: Phase map identifying Al2Cu and AlCuSc phases at grain boundaries
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.TEM: HAADF images and EDS maps showing Cu-rich and Sc-rich precipitates along grain boundaries; precipitate sizes 116-117 nm at boundaries, 42 nm intragranular
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.SEM: Zeiss Gemini 300 SEM with advanced EBSD detector; AZtecCrystal software for data analysis

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at RT; ASTM B557M-10 standard; ISO 6892-2:2018; strain rate not specified
at 200 °C; 10 min hold before loading; ISO 6892-2:2018
Properties_Info.Note: Retains 83% of RT yield strength at 200°C

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 250 °C; 10 min hold before loading; ISO 6892-2:2018
Properties_Info.Note: Retains 74% of RT yield strength at 250°C

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 300 °C; 10 min hold before loading; ISO 6892-2:2018
Properties_Info.Note: Drops to 37% of RT yield strength at 300°C

Composition_Info.Note: Powder composition reported as Al-3.89Cu-1.22Li-0.98Sc-0.43Zr wt%; Al balance computed as 93.48 wt%

Process_Text.original: Gas-atomized alloy powder fabricated by LPBF using LiM-X260A LPBF machine; Laser power 300 W, scanning velocity 1200 mm/s, hatch spacing 0.1 mm, layer thickness 40 um; relative density exceeding 99.9%; then heat-treated: gradual heating at 10 °C/min from RT to 300°C in KSL-1400X muffle furnace, held at 300°C for 1 h, cooled to ambient temperature in air
Process_Text.simplified: LPBF heat-treated; 300 W, 1200 mm/s, 0.1 mm hatch, 40 um layer; HT at 300°C for 1 h, air cooled

Process_Info.Equipment: LiM-X260A LPBF machine; KSL-1400X muffle furnace

Microstructure_Text.original: Nearly random grain orientation distribution confirmed by IPF maps and weak pole figures with max texture intensity 1.83; fine equiaxed grains (avg 1.53 um) and coarse columnar grains (avg 1.76 um); no significant grain coarsening after HT; increased number of precipitates in both equiaxed and columnar grain areas; fine precipitates within columnar grains coalesced and grew to 72 nm (71% growth from AF); nearly continuously stacked precipitates along grain boundaries (125 nm equiaxed, 123 nm columnar); ring-shaped structure at nanoscale around equiaxed grains; strip-shaped structure along columnar grain boundaries
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Random orientation FCC matrix; fine equiaxed (1.53 um) and columnar grains (1.76 um); increased precipitate density; intragranular precipitates 72 nm; grain boundary precipitates 123-125 nm; stable nanostructure after HT

Advanced_Quantitative_Features.EBSD: IPF maps showing nearly random grain orientation; weak texture with max intensity 1.83; fine equiaxed grains 1.53 um, coarse columnar grains 1.76 um
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.TKD: Phase map identifying Al2Cu and AlCuSc phases at grain boundaries
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.TEM: HAADF images and EDS maps showing increased precipitate density after HT; intragranular precipitates 72 nm (coalesced from 42 nm); grain boundary precipitates 123-125 nm
Advanced_Quantitative_Features.SEM: Zeiss Gemini 300 SEM with advanced EBSD detector; AZtecCrystal software for data analysis

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at RT; ASTM B557M-10 standard; ISO 6892-2:2018
Properties_Info.Note: Room temperature heat-treated; brittle nature with only 2% elongation
